title: Connected Textures (CTM) Overhaul
description: Connects tons of the vanilla textures!
body:
## CTM Overhaul - The Essential Connected Textures Pack

### ⚠️ This pack requires either [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) or OptiFine


<details>
<summary>Block List</summary>

-All Ores
 
-Cartography Table
 
-Chiseled Polished Blackstone
 
-Chiseled Red Sandstone
 
-Chiseled Sandstone
 
-Chiseled Stone Bricks
 
-Copper (and its weathered, exposed, and oxidized versions)
 
-Cut Copper (and its weathered, exposed, and oxidized versions)
 
-Cracked Polished Blackstone Bricks
 
-Cracked Stone Bricks
 
-Cut Red Sandstone
 
-Cut Sandstone
 
-Diamond Block
 
-Emerald Block
 
-End Stone Bricks
 
-Froglights
 
-Gold Block
 
-Iron Block
 
-Lapis Block
 
-Mossy Stone Bricks
 
-Netherite Block
 
-Polished Blocks
 
-Prismarine Bricks
 
-Purpur Pillar
 
-Quartz Bricks
 
-Quartz Block
 
-Redstone Block
 
-Redstone Lamp
 
-Reinforced Deepslate
 
-Sea lantern
 
-Shroomlight
 
-Smooth Stone
 
-Stone Bricks
 
-Tinted Glass


</details>



<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>
  
- Sammydoodlew

- Miffen Kop
</details>
